company_name: 公益社団法人北海道シルバー人材センター連合会
hunter_likelihood_reason: Silver HR Center focused on senior part-time/temporary staffing, not headhunting. MHLW page limits job seekers to elderly (高年齢者).
notes: Found official website at webc.sjc.ne.jp/doushiren/. Contact form at inquiry_1 page. Company is a Silver Human Resources Center providing temporary/light work for seniors, which is a non-headhunter vertical. No public email found on the site.
